name: @ministryofmany/membership
description: Semaphore group-membership proofs - per-context Merkle group, snapshots, client-side proving and server-side verification - with app-supplied storage and a choice of proof engine: a MerkleGroupProvider (the per-app eligible leaf set), an optional SnapshotStore (a live no-op store ships with the package), and a ProofEngine with two shipped engines - semaphoreEngine over @ministryofmany/identity (Semaphore v4, dynamic LeanIMT) and rlnEngine over @ministryofmany/rln (RLN, fixed depth-20). Every lookup is pinned to (context, subTree, root) for authorization, banned/revoked commitments drop out of refreshed roots, and the v4 leaf and the v3 RLN leaf are branded so they cannot be confused. Used by FreedInk, Discreetly, and Deforum.
author: AtHeartEngineer
